instruction: 帮我把团队技能情况整理到报告里

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

python3 -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws['A1'] = '技能'
ws['B1'] = '精通人数'
ws['C1'] = '熟练人数'
ws['D1'] = '了解人数'
ws['A2'] = 'Python'
ws['B2'] = 8
ws['C2'] = 15
ws['D2'] = 12
ws['A3'] = '数据分析'
ws['B3'] = 6
ws['C3'] = 18
ws['D3'] = 10
ws['A4'] = '机器学习'
ws['B4'] = 4
ws['C4'] = 8
ws['D4'] = 18
ws['A5'] = '云计算'
ws['B5'] = 3
ws['C5'] = 12
ws['D5'] = 20
wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/skill_matrix.xlsx')
"

phases.instruction: 帮我把团队技能情况整理到报告里
从/home/user/Desktop/skill_matrix.xlsx中找到精通人数最多的技能，追加到/home/user/Desktop/skill_report.txt末尾：'团队最强技能：Python（精通8人，熟练15人）'，保存

include: 团队最强技能：Python（精通8人，熟练15人）
